features.badge: ✦ Local AI · Fully Private · No Registration
features.title: Why Choose BgRemover
features.subtitle: Not just a background removal tool — fully local AI that protects your privacy while delivering professional quality.
features.useCasesSubtitle: From personal creation to enterprise batch processing, one tool handles it all
features.ctaSectionSubtitle: No registration required, 3 free uses per day. 10 per month after sign up.

featuresList.title: Fully Private, Zero Uploads
featuresList.desc: All AI processing runs locally in your browser via WebAssembly + ONNX Runtime. Images never leave your device — no server, no data collection, no privacy risk.

featuresList.title: Blazing Fast
featuresList.desc: After a one-time ~50MB model download, all processing is completely offline. No waiting for uploads, queues, or server responses — speed depends on your device.

featuresList.title: Professional-Grade Quality
featuresList.desc: Powered by state-of-the-art AI models that precisely detect hair, fur, and complex edges. Portraits, products, animals, plants — all handled perfectly with transparent PNG output.

featuresList.title: Supports Common Formats
featuresList.desc: Accepts PNG, JPG, WEBP and other common image formats, always outputs transparent-background PNG ready for design, e-commerce, and social media.

featuresList.title: Full Resolution Output
featuresList.desc: Pro and above plans support original resolution output with no compression or quality loss. Free users get up to 1080p, sufficient for everyday use.

featuresList.title: Batch Processing
featuresList.desc: Pro supports 10 images per batch; Business supports 50 per batch — dramatically boosting productivity for e-commerce product photo workflows.

featuresList.title: API Access
featuresList.desc: Business subscribers can integrate background removal into their own products or workflows via REST API, supporting automated batch processing.

featuresList.title: Cross-Platform Support
featuresList.desc: Browser-based, nothing to install. Works on Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android. Fully supported in Chrome, Safari, and Firefox.

useCasesList.title: E-Commerce Products
useCasesList.desc: Instantly remove messy backgrounds to generate clean white or transparent product images and boost conversion.

useCasesList.title: Portrait & ID Photos
useCasesList.desc: Precisely detect hair edges to easily create ID photos, avatars, and social media profile pictures.

useCasesList.title: Design Assets
useCasesList.desc: Quickly extract design elements without Photoshop — export transparent PNG directly for design use.

useCasesList.title: Content Creation
useCasesList.desc: Bloggers and video creators quickly process cover images and sticker assets to elevate content quality.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Subscriptions for heavy users, credit packs for occasional or one-time needs. Both can be combined.
pricing.subscriptionNote: All subscriptions can be cancelled anytime · Auto-reverts to Free at end of period · Stackable with credit packs
pricing.creditsNote: Credits never expire · Stackable with subscriptions · Subscription quota consumed first
pricing.creditsBanner: ✦ Credits never expire · Stack with subscriptions · Same file size/resolution as Pro

faqs.q: What's the difference between credit packs and subscriptions?
faqs.a: Subscriptions are billed monthly with quota resetting each month. Credit packs are a one-time purchase that never expire. They can be combined — once your subscription quota runs out, credits are consumed automatically so you're never hard-blocked.

faqs.q: Are my images uploaded to a server?
faqs.a: No. All AI processing runs entirely in your browser locally (WebAssembly + ONNX Runtime). Images never leave your device.

faqs.q: Do credit packs really never expire?
faqs.a: Yes, credit pack balances are permanently valid and unaffected by monthly resets. This is the core advantage of credits over subscriptions.

faqs.q: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
faqs.a: Yes, cancel anytime with no penalties. After cancellation, you can continue using the service until the end of the current billing period, then it automatically reverts to Free.
Business subscribers can call the background removal function in bulk via REST API, suitable for integrating into your own products or workflows.
Yes, 7-day no-questions-asked refund. Please contact support@imagebackgrounderaser.shop and we'll handle it within 24 hours.

docs.title: User Guide
docs.subtitle: Quick start guide, plan limits, and API reference.

quickStart.title: Open the Tool
quickStart.desc: Visit the homepage — no registration or software installation required.

quickStart.title: Upload Your Image
quickStart.desc: Click the upload area or drag and drop an image. Supports PNG, JPG, and WEBP formats.

quickStart.title: Wait for Processing
quickStart.desc: The first use downloads a ~50MB AI model (one time only). Subsequent processing is fully offline, usually completing within seconds.

quickStart.title: Download the Result
quickStart.desc: Once processing is done, click "Download PNG" to save the transparent-background image.

docs.limitsNote: Credit packs (never expire) stack with subscriptions — same file size/resolution as Pro.
docs.apiNoteText: subscribers. Requests require a Session Cookie (obtained automatically after OAuth login).

apiEndpoints.desc: Consume one processing quota (call after successful processing)
